{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",

    "R1.2": "The output identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and provides specific fixes, walking the argument chain end-to-end.",

    "RX.1": "The output clearly marks areas of uncertainty and suggests double-checking, enhancing transparency.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers the exact scope requested, addressing each aspect of the abstract with detailed critiques.",
    "RX.4": "While the output identifies several issues, it does not introduce new errors or harmful content but does point out some minor regressions in the original.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated and justified, providing clear provenance."
  },
  "confidence": {

}

rationale.R1.2: The output identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and provides specific fixes, walking the argument chain end-to-end.
rationale.R1.4: The output maps against existing work in detail, highlighting both similarities and differences, providing a nuanced novelty assessment.
rationale.RX.1: The output clearly marks areas of uncertainty and suggests double-checking, enhancing transparency.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers the exact scope requested, addressing each aspect of the abstract with detailed critiques.
rationale.RX.4: While the output identifies several issues, it does not introduce new errors or harmful content but does point out some minor regressions in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated and justified, providing clear provenance.
